positive: A whimsical, detailed illustration of a magical forest at twilight. The central subject is a large, luminous owl perched on a thick, gnarled branch. The owl's feathers are stylized and iridescent blue and gold. Surrounding the owl are glowing mushrooms, stylized fireflies emitting warm yellow light, and intricately patterned vines winding through oversized, tropical leaves. The composition is highly symmetrical, utilizing strong vertical and curved lines to draw the eye inward. Style should be modern folk illustration mixed with Art Nouveau elegance, executed with clean, bold lines and flat areas of color contrasted with high-detail glowing accents. Color palette: Deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, pops of luminous yellow and magenta. Focus on clean silhouettes and high contrast for print readability. Isolated, sticker-like artwork on a neutral background.
